description:
Most codebases aren't designed for AI. Learn why software architecture matters more than ever and how deep modules create the structure AI needs to work effectively.

Sign up for the AI Hero newsletter:

https://aihero.dev/s/j6UNFU

Follow Matt on Twitter:

https://twitter.com/mattpocockuk

Join the Discord:

https://aihero.dev/s/dpc89J
fulltitle: Your codebase is NOT ready for AI (here's how to fix it)
